case_title: AMIR EMADZADETH VS. DEUTSCHE LUFTHANSA AKTIENGESELLSCHAFT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AMIR EMADZADETH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE LUFTHANSA AKTIENGESELLSCHAFT IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY SYLVIA ADAMEK, CUSTOMER RELATIONS, LEGAL SPECIALIST. FILING WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,344.96 FILED BY EMADZADETH, AMIR AS TO DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE LUFTHANSA AKTIENGESELLSCHAFT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
